article_meta.title: US News exclusive ICE agent who opened fire on Renee Good was dragged, hospitalized by illegal migrant driver last year

reasoning: Mostly neutral paraphrase that avoids the source’s most charged framing, but it adopts the article’s politically loaded term “illegal immigrant/migrant” and under-attributes some claims/data. Perspectives are broadly represented but miss protesters/activists as a listed source type.

custom_reasoning.spin: Verbs and descriptors are mostly clinical; no replication of “mob of agitators” or similar. Minor use of “steep rise.”
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: Quantitative increases are presented as reported but not always attributed to DHS; however, framed as reported and consistent with article.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: Self-defense is attributed to officials; alleged actions are labeled as such.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: Avoids the article’s dramatic tone and metaphors; includes necessary facts only.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks made by the model.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about motives or internal states.
custom_reasoning.slant: Slight emphasis on official accounts but mentions tensions and protesters; aligns with source balance.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Omits listing protesters/activists (and Gov. Walz’s past critique) as perspectives in sources_represented.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Minimal subjective wording; mostly factual terms.
custom_reasoning.word_choice: Uses politically loaded term “illegal immigrant/migrant,” mirroring source language.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Does not amplify negative elements beyond the article’s content.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: Slight deference to official sources (DHS, Trump) consistent with article; limited non-official perspectives.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: More neutral than source but retains some loaded terminology.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Lists multiple official sources but omits protesters/activists as a source type present in the article’s narrative.
